title: CENTCOM Cooper: Iran 90% degraded — generation to rebuild navy, 90% naval mines eliminated, every Epic Fury objective met, proxies cut off
snippet: CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper testified before Senate that 38-day bombing campaign has diminished Iran's ability to threaten global security. 90% of defense industrial base destroyed. 90% of 8,000+ naval mines eliminated. 'Generation' to rebuild navy, years to recover drone/missile production. Every Operation Epic Fury objective met. Hamas, Hezbollah, Houthis all cut off from Iranian weapons and support. Iran retains 'very moderate, if not small, capability' for regional strikes.
tag_reason: 쿠퍼 CENTCOM 사령관 상원 청문회는 이전 소스에 없음. 이란 군사력 평가 정량화 신규 데이터.
